messages.content: # Here is how to fix the “Unfortunately, Assetto Corsa crashed” error!

# Method 1
> Follow the https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322225183297376266 guide to manually reinstall CSP.

# Method 2
> If you are crashing on the loading screen
> Load the game again and take note of the last thing you see on the left bottom corner since that is what the game cannot load and is crashing on. 
> Depending on what it is, cars/tracks or csp related redirect them to first deleting it then reinstalling it manually.

> If it is on a car, <#1440122305861652520> 
> If it is on a track, <#1457475437809631416> 
> If it is on the connecting to IP, you are having connection issues and should try restarting your pc/router
> If it is on anything else, https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322240298210033804 

# Method 3
> Go to `Settings > Assetto Corsa > Video` and lower your video settings.
> - Make sure `MSAA` is not `8x`, 
> - `Shadows Resolution` is not above `2048x2048` and 
> - `Rendering Frequency` is set to `two faces per frame`.

## If these do not work, please seek further assistance
